name: lab-agent
description: Installable desktop agent for the Virtual Lab — full-screen capture + consent-gated remote control that the browser sandbox can't do.
author: PlacementRanker

comments.workspace: Like apps/mobile, this project lives OUTSIDE the pnpm workspace and manages its own install — run `npm install` HERE, not from the repo root.
comments.nut-js: @nut-tree-fork/nut-js (optionalDependencies) is the input-injection (mouse/keyboard) backend used ONLY when a student grants remote control. It ships native (N-API) binaries that target a stock Node ABI, so it needs a native rebuild for Electron's bundled Node — run `npm run rebuild` after install. It is OPTIONAL on purpose: the agent installs and screen-sharing works fine without it; remote control is simply disabled if it is missing or fails to load. See README.md → 'Remote control / native input'.
comments.build: electron-builder config below. appId/signing are placeholders — set a real signing identity + notarization (mac) / code-sign cert (win) before shipping a public installer. Screen Recording + Accessibility are TCC runtime grants, not entitlements (see README); the NS*UsageDescription strings live in build.mac.extendInfo.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run copy:renderer

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to share your camera in a Virtual Lab session.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used to share your microphone in a Virtual Lab session.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Used to share your screen with your teacher in a Virtual Lab session.
